content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To       :   File - §84206

Date  :    June 15, 1978


From  :   FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
          Barbara Campbell

Subject:  Combined Filing


          Tony Alperin called this morning to ask whether a combined
semiannual/first preelection campaign statement could be filed in
the following situation:

          There will be a recall election on August 15, 1978, in
Los Angeles County.  The first preelection campaign statement's
closing date is July 3, 1978.

          Tony asked whether one statement, instead of two, could
be filed by nonabbreviated campaign statement filers as long as
that combined statement was filed at the earlier deadline.  After
discussing the situation was Gina, Ted and Bob Stern, I advised
Tony that such a combined statement could be filed by July 6,
1978, instead of the first preelection campaign statement due
July 6, 1978, covering through July 3, 1978, and the semiannual
statement due July 31, 1978, covering from January 1 through June 30,
1978.  The combined statement should cover the period from January 1
through July 3, 1978.


BC:plh

sections.question_synthetic: Whether a combined semiannual/first preelection campaign statement could be filed by nonabbreviated campaign statement filers in lieu of two separate statements for a recall election, if filed by the earlier deadline.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: A combined statement covering January 1 through July 3, 1978 may be filed by July 6, 1978, replacing both the first preelection campaign statement (due July 6, covering through July 3) and the semiannual statement (due July 31, covering January 1 through June 30).
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a brief advice letter with narrative format rather than formal Q/A sections. Includes internal FPPC notations (BC:plh) and references to staff discussion. No formal conclusion section header present. Synthesized sections based on content structure.

CONCLUSION: A combined statement covering January 1 through July 3, 1978 may be filed by July 6, 1978, replacing both the first preelection campaign statement (due July 6, covering through July 3) and the semiannual statement (due July 31, covering January 1 through June 30).

After discussing the situation was Gina, Ted and Bob Stern, I advised Tony that such a combined statement could be filed by July 6, 1978, instead of the first preelection campaign statement due July 6, 1978, covering through July 3, 1978, and the semiannual statement due July 31, 1978, covering from January 1 through June 30, 1978. embedding.summary: FPPC advises that a combined semiannual/first preelection campaign statement may be filed in lieu of two separate statements for a recall election scheduled for August 15, 1978, provided it is filed by the earlier deadline of July 6, 1978 and covers the full period from January 1 through July 3, 1978.
